mapper.sql: id, name, address, phone, business_hours, longitude, latitude, image_url, status, add_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM clothing_store WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM clothing_store WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY id

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clothing_store
deleted = 0 AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') AND status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clothing_store (name, address, phone, business_hours, longitude, latitude, image_url, status, deleted, add_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{address}, #{phone}, #{businessHours}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{imageUrl}, #{status}, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE clothing_store SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
